title: Hardware In The Loop
subtitle: Layout in progress; multi-domain HITL platform for programmable sensor, actuator, power, and communication emulation
stackup: Stackup to be added from the Altium layer stack manager or fabrication package
summary: A hardware-in-the-loop platform designed to electrically emulate the sensors, actuators, and interfaces used by the flight avionics system. The board combines programmable RTD, thermocouple, pressure-transducer, current-loop, and differential-sensor channels with valve and deployment-load interfaces, ADC and DAC conversion, multi-rail power, Compute Module 5 control, and wired communication interfaces.
mainConstraints: Reproduce the electrical behavior of multiple flight sensors from one configurable platform
Generate low-noise analog outputs across several signal ranges and interface types
Keep switching-power and actuator circuitry from coupling into precision emulation channels
Support both automated test control and direct bench access
Document the design from exported Altium artifacts without parsing raw schematic or PCB files
publicNote: This project is derived from the exported Altium schematic PDF only. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.
